scripts.build: pnpm --filter @cories-firebase-startup-template-v3/common build && pnpm --filter @cories-firebase-startup-template-v3/back build && pnpm --filter @cories-firebase-startup-template-v3/dashboard build && pnpm --filter @cories-firebase-startup-template-v3/admin build && pnpm --filter @cories-firebase-startup-template-v3/marketing build && pnpm --filter @cories-firebase-startup-template-v3/docs build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @cories-firebase-startup-template-v3/common build && pnpm --filter @cories-firebase-startup-template-v3/back exec tsc --noEmit && pnpm --filter @cories-firebase-startup-template-v3/dashboard exec tsc -b && pnpm --filter @cories-firebase-startup-template-v3/admin exec tsc --noEmit && pnpm --filter @cories-firebase-startup-template-v3/marketing exec tsc --noEmit && pnpm --filter @cories-firebase-startup-template-v3/docs run typecheck
scripts.test: pnpm --filter @cories-firebase-startup-template-v3/common test && pnpm --filter @cories-firebase-startup-template-v3/back test && pnpm --filter @cories-firebase-startup-template-v3/dashboard test && pnpm --filter @cories-firebase-startup-template-v3/admin test && pnpm --filter @cories-firebase-startup-template-v3/marketing test && pnpm --filter @cories-firebase-startup-template-v3/docs test
scripts.test:integration: pnpm --filter @cories-firebase-startup-template-v3/common build && pnpm --filter @cories-firebase-startup-template-v3/common test:integration && pnpm --filter @cories-firebase-startup-template-v3/back test:integration && pnpm --filter @cories-firebase-startup-template-v3/dashboard test:integration && pnpm --filter @cories-firebase-startup-template-v3/admin test:integration
scripts.test:e2e: pnpm run test:e2e:smoke && pnpm run test:e2e:core
scripts.test:ci: pnpm run test && pnpm run test:integration
scripts.test:coverage: pnpm --filter @cories-firebase-startup-template-v3/common build && pnpm --filter @cories-firebase-startup-template-v3/common exec vitest run --coverage --coverage.reportsDirectory ../../coverage/common && pnpm --filter @cories-firebase-startup-template-v3/back exec vitest run --coverage --coverage.reportsDirectory ../../coverage/back && pnpm --filter @cories-firebase-startup-template-v3/dashboard exec vitest run --coverage --coverage.reportsDirectory ../../coverage/dashboard
scripts.dev: concurrently -n "dashboard,admin,marketing,docs,common,back,emulator" -c "green,blue,cyan,white,yellow,red,magenta" "cd ./packages/dashboard && pnpm dev" "cd ./packages/admin && pnpm dev" "cd ./packages/marketing && pnpm dev" "cd ./packages/docs && pnpm dev" "cd ./packages/common && pnpm build:watch" "cd ./packages/back && pnpm build:watch" "pnpm emulator"
scripts.deploy:back: bash -lc 'set -euo pipefail; cd packages/back; pnpm --dir ../common run pack; node ../../scripts/toggle-common-dependency.js ./package.json --to=tgz; cleanup(){ node ../../scripts/toggle-common-dependency.js ./package.json --to=workspace || true; }; trap cleanup EXIT; cd ../..; pnpm --filter @cories-firebase-startup-template-v3/common build; pnpm --filter @cories-firebase-startup-template-v3/back build; firebase deploy --only functions'
scripts.deploy: bash -lc 'set -euo pipefail; cd packages/back; pnpm --dir ../common run pack; node ../../scripts/toggle-common-dependency.js ./package.json --to=tgz; cleanup(){ node ../../scripts/toggle-common-dependency.js ./package.json --to=workspace || true; }; trap cleanup EXIT; cd ../..; pnpm build; firebase deploy --only functions,apphosting:frontend'
